exercises.title: Giving Updates
exercises.instruction: Shadow these update phrases. Use a clear, confident tone.
exercises.targetText: I'd like to provide an update on the project status.
tips: Start with 'I'd like to' - keep it quick and unstressed
Keep the pace steady and confident

exercises.title: Connecting Ideas
exercises.instruction: Practice linking words when connecting ideas in meetings.
exercises.targetText: Based_on that, I think_we_should proceed with the plan.
tips: Stress key ideas: based, think, proceed, plan

exercises.title: Emphasizing Key Points
exercises.instruction: Practice stressing the most important words to highlight key points.

exercises.title: Organizing Updates
exercises.instruction: Break this update into clear thought groups.
exercises.targetText: First, let me summarize the current situation. Next, I'll outline the challenges. Finally, I'll propose solutions.
chunks: First, let me summarize the current situation.
tips: Use sequential markers to structure your updates
Each marker is its own thought group
Stress the main ideas: summarize, situation, outline, challenges, propose, solutions

exercises.title: Requesting Clarification
exercises.instruction: Shadow these clarification phrases. Use a polite, inquisitive tone.
exercises.targetText: Could you clarify that point? I want to make sure I understand correctly.
tips: Voice rises at the end of questions: ↗
Stress: clarify, point, want, sure, understand, correctly
